news.title:
Crisil, CareEdge report moderation in credit ratios in H2 FY26.
India Ratings notes a dip in upgrade-to-downgrade ratio in FY26 vs FY25.
news.summary:
Crisil, CareEdge report moderation in credit ratios in H2 FY26.
India Ratings notes a dip in upgrade-to-downgrade ratio in FY26 vs FY25.

news.title:
Crisil predicts bank credit growth to moderate to 13% in FY27, down from 14% in FY26.
NPAs may rise to 2.5% by March 2027; MSME loans and deposit mobilisation key monitorables.
news.summary:
Crisil predicts bank credit growth to moderate to 13% in FY27, down from 14% in FY26.
NPAs may rise to 2.5% by March 2027; MSME loans and deposit mobilisation key monitorables.

news.title:
Rating agencies signal that India's corporate credit upgrades may have peaked due to global tensions and higher energy costs.
ICRA, Crisil, and India Ratings highlight balance sheet strength, but mid-tier firms and energy-dependent sectors remain vulnerable to disruptions.
news.summary:
Rating agencies signal that India's corporate credit upgrades may have peaked due to global tensions and higher energy costs.
ICRA, Crisil, and India Ratings highlight balance sheet strength, but mid-tier firms and energy-dependent sectors remain vulnerable to disruptions.

news.title:
Crisil Ratings forecasts ARCs' cumulative recovery rate to rise to 90% next fiscal, driven by resolutions in real estate, roads, and power.
Private ARCs' AUM fell 4% as SR redemptions outpaced acquisitions; low new stressed asset supply poses growth challenges.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings forecasts ARCs' cumulative recovery rate to rise to 90% next fiscal, driven by resolutions in real estate, roads, and power.
Private ARCs' AUM fell 4% as SR redemptions outpaced acquisitions; low new stressed asset supply poses growth challenges.

news.title:
India's IIP grew 5.2% YoY in Feb, driven by manufacturing growth at 6%, despite energy and input cost challenges, per Crisil.
Energy price surge, supply constraints, and geopolitical risks may impact manufacturing momentum and private sector recovery.
news.summary:
India's IIP grew 5.2% YoY in Feb, driven by manufacturing growth at 6%, despite energy and input cost challenges, per Crisil.
Energy price surge, supply constraints, and geopolitical risks may impact manufacturing momentum and private sector recovery.

news.title:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.
news.summary:
Vedanta approved Rs 11/share interim dividend for FY26, totaling Rs 4,300 crore.
Crisil declared Rs 28/share final dividend; record date set for April 3.

news.title:
India's auto sector may face supply disruptions in FY2027 due to vendor closures.
Rising energy costs and risks to key inputs could impact production across segments.
news.summary:
India's auto sector may face supply disruptions in FY2027 due to vendor closures.
Rising energy costs and risks to key inputs could impact production across segments.

news.title:
Crisil forecasts FY27 housing sales growth to moderate to 4-6%, from FY26's 5-7%.
The slowdown is linked to flattening growth in average selling prices and demand.
news.summary:
Crisil forecasts FY27 housing sales growth to moderate to 4-6%, from FY26's 5-7%.
The slowdown is linked to flattening growth in average selling prices and demand.

news.title:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.
news.summary:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.

news.title:
Crisil Ratings warns fertiliser production may dip 10-15% due to Middle East supply disruptions.
Manufacturers' profitability may decline due to lower capacity utilisation and raw material constraints.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings warns fertiliser production may dip 10-15% due to Middle East supply disruptions.
Manufacturers' profitability may decline due to lower capacity utilisation and raw material constraints.

news.title:
CRISIL faces INR 121.2 Cr tax demand for FY 2016-17 over merged subsidiaries.
The company plans to file rectification/appeal; no immediate financial impact.
news.summary:
CRISIL faces INR 121.2 Cr tax demand for FY 2016-17 over merged subsidiaries.
The company plans to file rectification/appeal; no immediate financial impact.

news.title:
Crisil Intelligence reports China's FDI share in India may rise to 2% post Press Note 3 changes.
Amendments could restore Chinese FDI to pre-Press Note 3 levels, aiding investment growth.
news.summary:
Crisil Intelligence reports China's FDI share in India may rise to 2% post Press Note 3 changes.
Amendments could restore Chinese FDI to pre-Press Note 3 levels, aiding investment growth.

news.title:
India Inc faces Q4 margin pressure due to West Asia conflict driving energy costs.
Rising crude oil and natural gas prices increase input costs, fueling inflation.
news.summary:
India Inc faces Q4 margin pressure due to West Asia conflict driving energy costs.
Rising crude oil and natural gas prices increase input costs, fueling inflation.

news.title:
CRISIL Ratings forecasts tractor sales growth to slow to 0-2% YoY next fiscal.
Sales may reach 1.2M units due to high base effect and El Nino impact.
news.summary:
CRISIL Ratings forecasts tractor sales growth to slow to 0-2% YoY next fiscal.
Sales may reach 1.2M units due to high base effect and El Nino impact.

news.title:
Crisil warns 35 GW renewable capacity may face grid curtailment by FY27.
Surplus power evacuation risk rises due to slow transmission infrastructure expansion.
news.summary:
Crisil warns 35 GW renewable capacity may face grid curtailment by FY27.
Surplus power evacuation risk rises due to slow transmission infrastructure expansion.

news.title:
CRISIL Ratings predicts India's basmati exports steady, up to 2% growth.
Middle East conflict unlikely to impact India's basmati export volume.
news.summary:
CRISIL Ratings predicts India's basmati exports steady, up to 2% growth.
Middle East conflict unlikely to impact India's basmati export volume.

news.title:
CRISIL warns CGD industry may face 8-10% sales drop due to West Asia conflict.
Natural gas supply disruptions expected until situation stabilises, impacting CGD volumes.
news.summary:
CRISIL warns CGD industry may face 8-10% sales drop due to West Asia conflict.
Natural gas supply disruptions expected until situation stabilises, impacting CGD volumes.

news.title:
Crisil forecasts a 50 bps margin squeeze for India Inc. by FY27.
Airlines, paints, and chemicals sectors are expected to face the worst impact.
news.summary:
Crisil forecasts a 50 bps margin squeeze for India Inc. by FY27.
Airlines, paints, and chemicals sectors are expected to face the worst impact.

news.title:
India Inc faces uneven challenges with rising oil prices, impacting sectors like paints, chemicals, tyres, ceramics, and fertilisers.
Crisil notes limited Q4 impact due to stable months; robust balance sheets shield Indian firms from severe disruptions.
news.summary:
India Inc faces uneven challenges with rising oil prices, impacting sectors like paints, chemicals, tyres, ceramics, and fertilisers.
Crisil notes limited Q4 impact due to stable months; robust balance sheets shield Indian firms from severe disruptions.

news.title:
Crisil's Sehul Bhatt highlights LNG disruptions in West Asia, increasing prices due to conflicts impacting industries.
Industrial sectors face immediate impact, followed by refiners, with severity surpassing past global crises.
news.summary:
Crisil's Sehul Bhatt highlights LNG disruptions in West Asia, increasing prices due to conflicts impacting industries.
